  "findings": [
    "Copper pipe end has visible burr and is unreamed",
    "Burr creates turbulence, flow restriction, and potential for debris accumulation"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Ream and deburr all affected copper pipe ends to smooth finish",
    "Inspect all joints before proceeding to pressure test"
  ],
  "rationale": "IPC Section 605.16.1 and standard trade practice require that cut pipe ends be reamed to full bore and chamfered smooth. A visible burr indicates non-compliance and risks system performance and safety.",
  "references": [
    "IPC 605.16.1",
    "Copper Development Association — Installation Standards"
  ]
}
